rationale: An open cover is a cover (def:cover-full) of A subset of X (def:subset) all of whose members are open sets, i.e. lie in tau (def:open-set). def:open-set -- the differentia that makes the cover 'open' -- was MISSING and is added. def:complement, def:fip, and def:intersection are removed: none appears in this definition; they are the dependencies of the neighbouring FIP-duality proposition (0024), pasted onto the wrong node.
notes: Same neighbour-paste miswiring as 0017 (the removed trio is exactly 0024's dep set, where they are genuinely load-bearing). MISSING-VOCABULARY FLAG: the ambient 'topological space (X, tau)' has no node -- def:topological-space does not exist in the index -- so it could not be added; recommend the reviewer create it. def:open-set is the available core concept.
